title: Aliciella nyensis
taxonomy: Aliciella nyensis is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Polemoniaceae. This plant is a part of the genus Aliciella, which is a group of annual or perennial plants. The family Polemoniaceae consists of about 20 genera and 200 species of plants. Aliciella nyensis is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It is a herbaceous plant that produces small, white or pink flowers.
